title: An Ordinance Mandating the Residents of Los Baños, Laguna and All Non-los Baños Residents Who Are Working or Doing Business Within the Municipality, to Register and Use the Los Baños Ligtas Ang Bayan Id, LB Lab Id) for Contactless Log-in and Screening for Covid-19, to Aid in the Prevention and Control of Coronavirus Transmission in the Municipality of Los Baños. (AUTHOR: HON. MARK LESTER B. DIZON,09/21 /2020)
